hooks.command: if [ -f .harness/sprint-state.json ]; then cat .harness/sprint-state.json; elif [ -f .harness/progress.md ]; then cat .harness/progress.md; fi
hooks.description: Read sprint state on session start to restore harness context after compaction or new session

hooks.command: if [ -d .harness ]; then bash -c 'echo "## Session $(date -Iseconds)" >> .harness/progress.md && echo "Stopped. Current sprint state should be committed." >> .harness/progress.md'; fi
hooks.description: Append session timestamp to progress log on stop

hooks.command: if [ -f .harness/evals/sprint-*.md ] && [ -f .harness/sprint-state.json ]; then bash -c 'LATEST=$(ls -t .harness/evals/sprint-*-r*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$LATEST" ]; then echo "Latest eval: $LATEST" >&2; fi'; fi
hooks.description: After evaluation tool calls, surface the latest eval result path for state tracking
